metadata.name: Create Logical Volumes
metadata.description: Create physical volumes, volume groups, and logical volumes with LVM tools and persistently mount them
objectives: Create physical volumes, volume groups, and logical volumes with LVM tools
Create file systems on logical volumes and persistently mount them

tasks.name: Verify GPT partition table on /dev/sdb
tasks.description: The /dev/sdb disk should have a GPT partition table
tasks.success_message: GPT partition table is configured on /dev/sdb
tasks.failure_message: GPT partition table is not configured on /dev/sdb
hints: Create GPT partition table with: sudo parted /dev/sdb mklabel gpt

tasks.name: Verify first LVM partition exists
tasks.description: The /dev/sdb1 partition should exist with LVM flag
tasks.failure_message: First LVM partition /dev/sdb1 does not exist or lacks LVM flag
hints: Create: sudo parted /dev/sdb mkpart first 1MiB 257MiB
Set LVM flag: sudo parted /dev/sdb set 1 lvm on
Register: sudo udevadm settle

tasks.name: Verify second LVM partition exists
tasks.description: The /dev/sdb2 partition should exist with LVM flag
tasks.failure_message: Second LVM partition /dev/sdb2 does not exist or lacks LVM flag
hints: Create: sudo parted /dev/sdb mkpart second 257MiB 513MiB
Set LVM flag: sudo parted /dev/sdb set 2 lvm on
Register: sudo udevadm settle

tasks.name: Verify physical volumes are created
tasks.description: Both /dev/sdb1 and /dev/sdb2 should be LVM physical volumes
hints: Create PVs with: sudo pvcreate /dev/sdb1 /dev/sdb2
Verify with: sudo pvs or sudo pvdisplay

tasks.name: Verify vg_servera volume group exists
tasks.description: The vg_servera volume group should exist
tasks.failure_message: Volume group vg_servera does not exist
hints: Create VG with: sudo vgcreate vg_servera /dev/sdb1 /dev/sdb2
Verify with: sudo vgs or sudo vgdisplay vg_servera

tasks.name: Verify lv_servera logical volume exists
tasks.description: The lv_servera logical volume should exist in vg_servera with 400 MiB
tasks.failure_message: Logical volume lv_servera does not exist
hints: Create LV with: sudo lvcreate -n lv_servera -L 400M vg_servera
Verify with: sudo lvs or sudo lvdisplay /dev/vg_servera/lv_servera

tasks.name: Verify logical volume size is 400 MiB
tasks.description: The lv_servera logical volume should be approximately 400 MiB
tasks.success_message: Logical volume size is approximately 400 MiB
tasks.failure_message: Logical volume size is not 400 MiB
hints: Create the LV with: lvcreate -n lv_servera -L 400M vg_servera

tasks.name: Verify XFS filesystem on logical volume
tasks.description: The lv_servera logical volume should be formatted with XFS
tasks.failure_message: XFS filesystem is not on lv_servera
hints: Format with: sudo mkfs -t xfs /dev/vg_servera/lv_servera
Verify with: lsblk -f /dev/vg_servera/lv_servera

tasks.name: Verify /data directory exists
tasks.description: The /data mount point directory should exist
hints: Create with: sudo mkdir /data

tasks.name: Verify /etc/fstab entry for /data
tasks.description: An entry for /data mount point should exist in /etc/fstab
tasks.failure_message: fstab entry for /data is missing or incorrect
hints: Add to /etc/fstab: /dev/vg_servera/lv_servera /data xfs defaults 0 0
Run: sudo systemctl daemon-reload after editing fstab

tasks.name: Verify /data is mounted
tasks.description: The /data directory should have the LV mounted
tasks.failure_message: Logical volume is not mounted on /data
hints: Mount with: sudo mount /data
Verify with: mount | grep /data or df -h /data
